title: Lemon Posset
excerpt: Ingredients 500 ml cream 125 ml castor sugar Zest of one lemon. Grate very finely. Juice of one lemon Method Heat the cream and castor sugar in a pot. Cook for 3 minutes until the castor sugar has dissolved. Let cool slightly and stir in the lemon zest. Stir in the lemon juice. Pour out …
html:
Ingredients

  • 500 ml cream
  • 125 ml castor sugar
  • Zest of one lemon. Grate very finely.
  • Juice of one lemon

Method

  • Heat the cream and castor sugar in a pot. Cook for 3 minutes until the castor sugar has dissolved.
  • Let cool slightly and stir in the lemon zest.
  • Stir in the lemon juice.
  • Pour into small glasses
  • Let set in the fridge for about 3 hours
  • Serve with berries and mint leaves
